PropertyMetaDataBitMaskCaptions Property

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns display names for the bits in a bit mask.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public IReadOnlyList<MultiLanguageStringData> BitMaskCaptions { get; set; }

Property Value

Type: IReadOnlyListMultiLanguageStringData

Implements

IServerPropertyBitMaskCaptions
Remarks
If this property is not null, property values should be interpreted as bit masks. This is only valid for properties of type Int.
